item.description:
# Skills v1.2.0
- Themes Finder Quick Look previews for agent files: markdown, JSON, JSON Lines, YAML, TOML, INI/config, dotenv, CSV, logs, diff/patch, SQL, property lists, XML, and shell scripts. - Customize every file type from the new Quick Look Themes page (bottom of the sidebar): theme presets (Skillz, GitHub light/dark, Terminal Mono), font family and size, line numbers, wrap, JSON pretty-print, and a full-size live preview with a Test Preview button. - Renders markdown previews as rich text with highlighted frontmatter; remote images stay blocked unless you opt in per type. - Keeps everything optional: each type has a "Preview with Skills" switch, one master switch turns all theming off, and the extension can be disabled in System Settings or removed by deleting the app. - Adds a Source | Rich Text toggle to the skill editor. - Cleans up the layout: minimal top bar, New Skill / Refresh / Quick Look Themes pinned to the sidebar, and skill actions in the detail header. - Supports macOS 14.0 and newer.

# Skills v1.0.4
- Adds catalog sorting by name, date modified, platform, or type from the list header. - Adds optional skill body search that matches `SKILL.md` content, not just names. - Adds Duplicate Skill and Copy to Platform from the skill context menu. - Remembers your selection, section, platform filter, and sort order across launches. - Upgrades the markdown editor with the native Find bar, undo, and a line-wrap toggle. - Shows toast confirmations for skill actions. - Supports macOS 14.0 and newer.

# Skills v1.0.3
- Supports macOS 14.0 and newer. - Adds Sparkle update checks from the Skills menu. - Keeps the existing macOS 26 glass styling while preserving the material fallback on older macOS releases. - Keeps local skill, MCP, plugin, and agent-monitoring behavior unchanged.
